positive: A stylized, maximalist abstract floral pattern centered around a group of overlapping exotic jungle leaves (monstera, banana, palm) and stylized bioluminescent flowers. The composition should be a dense, repeating vertical tile pattern, perfect for apparel printing. Color palette: deep midnight blues, vibrant tropical turquoise, electric emerald green, and touches of glowing magenta and luminous gold. Use negative space intelligently to define the shapes. Art style: Mid-Century Modern meets Neo-Art Deco botanical illustration, giving it strong, graphic lines and high contrast. Ideal for a clean, repeating print fabric texture. Flat, vector-graphic quality, ultra-detailed, high resolution, symmetrically composed.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noisy, text, watermark, logo, messy, dirty, low detail, cartoon, photo, signature, multiple subjects, asymmetrical, grain, poor anatomy, extra limbs
